titleStmt.title: SII 41.400: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 400. (A.R. No. 615 of 1905.) Tiṅgaḷūr, Erode Taluk, Coimbatore District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Alagiyaraja-Perumal temple at Tiṅgaḷūr.

summary.p: Records that the king granted the entire tax revenue of the village of Tāḷūṉṟi in Kuṟuppu-nāḍu to the temple of Sundara-pāṇḍya-Viṇṇagar Emberumān at Tiṅgaḷūr. A number of taxes (kaḍamai, oṭṭachchu, etc) is mentioned. The officials Kālingarāyan, Kachchirāyan and Viḻuppādarāyan have signed the document.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīvirapāṇṭiya tevaṟkuyāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu svasti
śrī . tribhuvaṉaccakrava ttik Oṉeriṉmaikoṇ
ṭāṉ kuṟuppu nāṭṭut tiṅkaḷur cuntarapāṇ
ṭiya viṇṇakaremperumāṉ koyilil tiruppati śrī
vaiṣṇavarkaḷukkum nampimārkkum Innāyanārkkumamutupaṭi
Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum veñcaṉaṅkaḷukkum Innā
ṭṭut tāḷūṉṟi nīrnilattukkum puṉceykkum Iṟukku
ṅkaṭamai Oṭṭaccuṅkāluṅ kalamum nattavariyun taṇṇi
rkkāṇam Uppāyan taṟiyiṟaiyuḷḷiṭṭa meliṟai kiḻi
ṟaiyum Iṟaiyeṇṇaiyuṅ kāṇiyuñ cāmantarveṇṭuko
ḷuṅ kuṟṟateṇṭamum Elavai yukavai maṟṟum Eppeya
ṟppaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭat tantom Innāyanār Aḻakap
perumāḷukku Ippaṭikkuc candrādityavatcelvatākak kalli
luñ cempilum veṭṭi Ivvūr kuṭiyeṟṟik koḷka
Ippaṭikku kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku kacciyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikkuviḻuppātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 41.400 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
